changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE stock_move (
id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
product_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
quantity NUMERIC(18,4) NOT NULL,
uom_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
source_location_id BIGINT, destination_location_id BIGINT,
move_type VARCHAR(20), -- receipt / delivery / internal / adjustment
state VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'draft',
reference VARCHAR(100),
created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
CONSTRAINT fk_move_product FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id) );
